title: Fortis Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Fortis Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Fortis Healthcare are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Fortis Healthcare:
Fortis Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare!
